headline: REG's Q1 FFO Misses Estimates, Revenues Top on Leasing Momentum
summary: Regency Centers' Q1 FFO falls short of estimates, but revenues beat on strong leasing momentum, solid rent spreads and occupancy.

headline: A Look At Regency Centers (REG) Valuation As Modest Undervaluation Signals Meet Rich Earnings Multiple
summary: Why Regency Centers Stock Is On Investors’ Radar Today Regency Centers (REG) continues to attract attention after a period where the share price and fundamentals present a mixed picture, prompting investors to reassess how the REIT’s current valuation lines up with its income profile. headline: Regency Centers: Fairly Valued Given Moderate Growth
